name: Gensokyo RPG
description:
Touhou - Land of Fantasy

Extra initial messages!

An escape from everyday life. Boring days are inevitable. You wake up, follow the routine, and then repeat that over, over, and over again... Until something interesting happens. Something unique and fantasic. During a walk at midnight - coincidentally meant to be an escape for the mind - you are unadvertedly sent to an unknown place by something you couldn't quite react to. Nothing but a pitch black void and... eyes. And a map, too! Is this something worth being terrified over, or a chance at discovery and novelty? A chance to take on a completely new life, in a completely new place? That is up to you to decide.

Locations!

This is the map of Gensokyo I used (well, it used to be there, but a Janitor AI update made images invisible. Just bear with me until that is reverted!). Sure, it is a lot of places, so I couldn't include each one of them. Here's a list of what places are included:

INCLUDED:

  • Woods (made up center location, used to be starting location)

  • Human Village/Field

  • Spring Lane

  • Misty Lake

  • Scarlet Devil Mansion

  • Forest of Magic / Alice's house / Kirisame Magic Shop

  • Hakurei Shrine

  • Youkai Mountain / Moriya Shrine

  • Bamboo Forest of the Lost / Eintei

  • Garden of the sun

QnA Time! (Please read before leaving any criticism, thanks! And I'm sorry for making you scroll, mobile users...)

Will this bot be updated? (extra locations, extra definitions, etcetera...)

Yes, but also no! This is made to be as optimized as possible (usable with Janitor LLM, though not exactly the best LLM for it) and not really capable of holding every single location and character within Gensokyo or other bigger locations. Now, I will obviously revisit this bot's information since I feel like I can optimize things or make the intro a little more unique... Hmph.

The bot makes up/messes up descriptions! Why?!

Again, since this is made for Janitor LLM, not every character or location is 100% accurate. For characters in particular, I focused more on their roles, appearance, and capabilities. They include bits of personality and backstory as well, but don't expect them to include super accurate definitions about their dark past (for example, Mokou's and Kaguya's rivalry). In my personal experience, this has become far less common than with other Gensokyo bots.

Bot talks for me... Any way to solve this?

Yes. Just reroll your message. I have done everything in my power to prevent this issue, and if it still happens... shrug. AI is like a stubborn child - always doing the opposite of what it's told. You can try to find prompts and stuff f
creator: Un5ki
